headline_subtitle: Warburg, NAD, fat & deuterium — mitochondria as the central case.

cards.body: Direct mechanistic claim: the {{concept:Warburg shift}} happens because the cancer cell is trying to {{concept:de-fragging}} its own cytoplasm of deuterium load — not a defect, an adaptation. Frames the canonical 'cancer prefers glucose' narrative as a downstream symptom, not the primary cause.

Warburg shift.text: Otto Warburg's 1924 observation: cancer cells preferentially use aerobic glycolysis (fermenting glucose to lactate even in the presence of oxygen) instead of oxidative phosphorylation. The mainstream reading is a mitochondrial defect; Kruse reads it as a deliberate metabolic reroute the cell uses to manage internal deuterium.

de-fragging.text: Kruse-coined term for restoring structured (EZ) water lattice coherence inside the cell, reversing the disordered state that sets in under deuterium load. Analogous to defragmenting a fragmented disk, but for the intracellular water phase.

cards.source_quote: WHY THE WARBURG SHIFT HAPPENS IN CANCER? The cell is trying to de-frag its own cytoplasm of deuterium ya' big Dummy.

cards.lead: Cancer Cells DO Oxidize Fatty Acids:
cards.body: Rebuttal to the recurring 'cancer cells can't efficiently oxidize fatty acids and rely almost exclusively on fermentation' claim. Kruse argues the underlying mitochondrial physics permit lipid oxidation under glucose restriction — the fermentation lock-in is a fed-state artefact, not a metabolic ceiling. Direct attack on the {{concept:Seyfried}}-lineage 'starve the tumor with keto' narrative.

Seyfried.text: Thomas Seyfried — Boston College biologist, lead proponent of the 'cancer as a metabolic disease' framework and the ketogenic-diet-starves-tumor thesis built on Warburg's glucose observation. Kruse argues this oversimplifies tumor metabolic plasticity.

cards.source_quote: The assertion from a trader who is beyond Seyfried ignorant that cancer cells cannot efficiently oxidize fatty acids and rely almost exclusively on fermentation…

cards.lead: NAD+ Parsimony Refuted via Blood Dynamics:
cards.body: Pushback on the {{concept:Brenner}}-lab line that mitochondrial-disease patients only show low blood {{concept:NAD+}}. Kruse argues the blood compartment is a misread proxy — the actual biophysical refutation comes from cellular-scale dynamics the centralized framing ignores. Reads as a salvo in a longer-running NAD-metabolism dispute.

Brenner.text: Charles Brenner — biochemist (UC Irvine / City of Hope), developer of NAD quantitation technology, principal voice for the canonical NAD-precursor-supplementation hypothesis in aging and mitochondrial disease.

NAD+.text: Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide — central electron-carrier coenzyme in mitochondrial energy metabolism. Cellular NAD+ levels gate oxidative phosphorylation throughput; the supplement industry has built around the assumption that raising blood NAD+ raises intracellular NAD+, a leap Kruse disputes.

cards.body: Mechanistic chain claim: rising systemic deuterium load destroys {{concept:BAT}} mitochondrial efficiency, converting brown adipocytes into {{concept:WAT}}. Higher deuterium → more WAT → progression to {{concept:NAFLD}}. Reads as a unified physical explanation for the parallel decline of thermogenic capacity and liver health in modern populations.

BAT.text: Brown Adipose Tissue — fat tissue rich in mitochondria that burns calories directly as heat (thermogenesis) via UCP1-mediated uncoupling. Highest in infants; declines through adulthood.

WAT.text: White Adipose Tissue — the storage-form fat that accumulates with positive energy balance. Mitochondrially poor compared to BAT; metabolically inert by comparison.

NAFLD.text: Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease — abnormal lipid accumulation in hepatocytes absent significant alcohol intake. Now the most common chronic liver condition in industrialised populations.

cards.source_quote: Deuterium destroys BAT and turns it into WAT. More D+ creates more WAT adipocytes. More D+ = NAFLD.

cards.body: Surfacing the Mississippian limestone {{concept:karst}} aquifer system under Kentucky as a regional biophysical case study, and pairing the observation with a one-line {{concept:AMOC}} flag. Reads as another node in the dipole-decline narrative — where the aquifer's dielectric properties are coupled to ocean-current state.

karst.text: Landscape formed by the dissolution of soluble bedrock (typically limestone, dolomite, or gypsum), producing caves, sinkholes, and large interconnected groundwater systems. Kentucky sits on one of Earth's most extensive karst aquifers.

AMOC.text: Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation — the system of ocean currents that moves warm surface water poleward and cold deep water back south. Its weakening is a flagship indicator of climate-system reorganization.

cards.source_quote: Many do not know Kentucky sits on top of one of the most expansive, interconnected Mississippian limestone karst systems on Earth.

bullets.title: What Is NAD+ in Biophysical Terms?
bullets.summary: New thread reframing {{concept:NAD+}} away from the supplementation/aging narrative toward a structural-biophysics reading: NAD+ as a state variable of mitochondrial coupling, not a consumable molecule to top up via pills. Direct extension of today's blood-NAD parsimony refutation tweet.

NAD+.text: Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide — central electron-carrier coenzyme in mitochondrial energy metabolism. Kruse's reframing treats its concentration as a downstream readout of cellular field state, not an independent lever.

bullets.title: Understanding Vortices
bullets.summary: New thread on the geometric-vortex thesis — 7/12/21-turn spiral resonators, water-lattice coherence, Chromosome 2 ITL coupling. Continuation of the longer-running 'geometry alters material physics' line; pairs with today's broader biophysics-vs-chemistry frame.

bullets.title: Fascia, Joints and Deuterium
bullets.summary: New thread connecting connective-tissue health (fascia + joint integrity) to systemic deuterium load. Reads as the structural-tissue counterpart to today's deuterium→BAT→NAFLD chain — same mechanism, different tissue.

bullets.title: nnEMF Field-Survey Protocol
bullets.summary: Concrete home-shielding workflow for {{concept:nnEMF}}: walk the perimeter to identify the strongest-signal side, scan for nearby cell towers; if no tower is close, attribute to neighbour Wi-Fi. For single-story homes, wire-mesh fence shielding on the implicated side. Transferable, parameter-light.

nnEMF.text: non-native ElectroMagnetic Field. Kruse shorthand for the artificial RF / microwave / low-frequency electromagnetic emissions humans engineered into the environment (cell, Wi-Fi, power-line, smart-meter), as opposed to the geomagnetic / cosmic / solar fields biology evolved under.
